chunk_text: Blue Ridge Cafe — meals: Business meals with a client are 50% deductible when they are ordinary and necessary for the trade or business under IRC section 274.
Nova Fuel Station — mileage: Business mileage is deductible using the standard mileage rate or actual expenses; contemporaneous logs of date, purpose, and miles are required.
Cedar Office Hub — home_office: The home office deduction requires a space used regularly and exclusively for business as the principal place of business.
Pine Print Supply — supplies: Office supplies such as paper, toner, and pens consumed within the tax year are deductible ordinary business expenses on Schedule C.
Cascade SaaS Inc — software: Off-the-shelf SaaS subscriptions used for business operations are ordinary and necessary expenses reported on Schedule C line 22.
Skyway Airlines — travel: Overnight business travel away from the tax home is deductible; lodging is 100% deductible while meals during travel are typically 50%.
Ridge Mobile Wireless — phone: The business-use portion of a cell phone is deductible; personal use must be allocated out and documented for audit support.
Fiber One ISP — internet: Home internet used for business is deductible on the business-use percentage; keep a written allocation of business vs personal use.
Harbor Bistro — meals: Business meals with a client are 50% deductible when they are ordinary and necessary for the trade or business under IRC section 274.
Summit Rentals — mileage: Business mileage is deductible using the standard mileage rate or actual expenses; contemporaneous logs of date, purpose, and miles are required.
Aspen Software Co — home_office: The home office deduction requires a space used regularly and exclusively for business as the principal place of business.
Meadow Fuel Co — supplies: Office supplies such as paper, toner, and pens consumed within the tax year are deductible ordinary business expenses on Schedule C.
River Stationery — software: Off-the-shelf SaaS subscriptions used for business operations are ordinary and necessary expenses reported on Schedule C line 22.
